name: Or_cluster_chr3L_67D
description: Drosophila chemoreceptor cluster: Or67a/b/c/d tandem cluster on chr3L. Drosophila has ~60 Or and ~60 Gr chemoreceptor genes total, dispersed across the genome with several tandem sub-clusters. Intra-cluster identity 40-95%, no genome-wide superfamily expansion like mammalian ORs.
